group_names.description: List of Auto Scaling group names to associate with the notification configuration.

notifications.description: List of notification types to trigger actions for the Auto Scaling group (e.g., `autoscaling:EC2_INSTANCE_LAUNCH`); must be valid AWS notification types.

topic_arn.description: ARN of the SNS topic to which Auto Scaling notifications will be sent; must be a valid SNS topic ARN.
